title: Soyjack Pumpkin Overlay
description: Pumpkin overlay replaced by soyjack's pog meme. (Optional cheat)
body:
The resource pack replaces pumkin's blur overlay with soyjack's pog meme. The overlay is a compressed image for fitting the style of the game but its presented in a high resolution.
Can potentially be seen as a cheat but was made only for entertaining purposes.
